subcodes.first_line: O thou whose heart's vessel hath been suffused with the water of the love of God, and whose heart's lamp hath been illumined by the lights of the knowledge of God, I have perused thy letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ترشح اناء قلبه بماء محبه الله و تنور زجاج فواده بانوار معرفه الله انی تلوت کتابک
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
